feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Supply Chain Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Supply Chain Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: PO Dates in SAP and how to utilize them
entry.content:
Is there a definition from SAP on how to use the different PO dates (PO Schedule date, Confirmation date, and Statistical Date)? 

What is the proper way to use the statistical date and should that print on the PO?

entry.title: How to reopen a closed contract in Ariba CMS
entry.content:
Hello All,

When I try to reopen a closed contract in Ariba with Amendment of type amendment and also with type republish I am getting proxy error as below. Please suggest a resolution to reopen the closed contract.

Proxy Error

The proxy server received an invalid response from an upstream server.
The proxy server could not handle the request

Reason: Error reading from remote server

entry.title: ATP is not working when MRP area is deactivated
entry.content:
Hi All,

ATP is not working in sales order when the MRP area is deactivated, which was active in the system previously.

Kindly let me know if any solution for the ATP to work without MRP area.

entry.title: kf2 value = kf1 value of previous period
entry.content:
in first period beginning inventory = initial stock 

in the subsequent periods beginning invenyory = ending inventory of previous period 

can someone help me to model this situation .

entry.title: Is is possible to do quick sum up/average by selecting specific cells in SAP IBP Planner Workspace?
entry.content:
I would like to see sum up or average value of couple of cells selected, similar to Excel functionality, so, let's say if I have 100pcs in June and 30pcs in February - by selecting two months I would like to see 130 pcs calculated and displayed on the fly, not the whole KF total. Is it possible in web interface - Planner Workspace?

Thank you!

entry.title: System does not allow posting from EWM to IM-MM if there is different inputs
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need your help for the following issue :

1) Product is batch managed

2) The system is not allowing for posting from EWM to IM-MM if there is different inputs in the Batch, but the requirement is ...it should post from EWM to IM-MM

3) With this regard, what are the pre-requisites I need to follow...Kindly help me out...

entry.title: Customer appearing in UDM_SUPERVISOR but not appearing in UDM_SPECIALIST
entry.content:
Hi,

There is one customer appearing in Supervisor worklist UDM_SUPERVISOR, but not appearing in worklist of specialist UDM_SPECIALIST, although specialist already assigned in UDM_BP. I executed transaction UDM_GENWL, but issue still exists.

Please support to find out the root cause.

Regards,

entry.title: The transaction code UDM_AUTOWRITEOFF don't close the dispute case
entry.content:
Hello together,

can you tell us, why the program don't close the dispute case?

We define the right reason code and escalation reason and save the transaction:

After the transaction, we go to the transaction code UDM_AUTOWRITEOFF and select the right data. The programm run and show this answer:

BUT, the dispute case must be close, that means, that the amount must be 0,00 EUR and the status must be "CLOSE". But the sap system don't close the dispute case and i can see the open amount and the old status.

What is the problem? I've checked also the customizing, all is fine. The G/L account and cost center is available. 

Can someone help us? Thank you so muss for the support.

Best regards,

L. E.

entry.title: Create a Blog button is Disabled. How to enable it ?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am a new joiner to the SAP community group. I want to post some blogs on the SAP TM subject matter but I see that the "Create a Blog " button is disabled. Please advise how this button can be enabled.

 

Regards

Sourav Bhaumik

entry.title: Allocate products to Distribution channels by percentage not Quantity
entry.content:
Hello Dears, 
My client has a Pain point that when products are produced, representative comes first has edge to load quantity he wants with no considerations for another Reps . He needs to constrains this by SAP System but not by quantity he need it by percentage. He does not want product allocations as follows if for example he produces 1000 pcs daily 
Dist.Channel 1 : 500 PCS
Dist.Channel 2 : 300 PCS 
Dist.channel 3 : 200 PCS 

Production is not a fixed quantity daily , so he needs it to be for example: 
Dist.channel 1 : 50 % 
Dist.channel 2 : 30 % 
Dist.channel 3 : 20 % 

so does anything in SAP Standards fit this requirement ?

@

entry.title: How to show the PO document type key in the "Create Purchase Order-Advanced" App?
entry.content:
In the "Create Purchase Order Advanced" App the keys of the PO Document Types (e.G. NB) are not shown. In the GUI I see them. 

I have already activated the setting: "Display Key".

entry.title: ML81N - how to set tree off
entry.content:
Hello,

In the ML81N transaction, how can I configure the tree to always be off?

We have verified that users accessing ML81N have access to all posted service sheets, including other users.

Please, could someone tell us how we can solve this problem?

Thanks!

entry.title: planned order basic dates and production dates
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are trying to figure out the issue happening when converting planned order to production order.
Please help us with the mechanisms of calculating the basic dates between planned order and production order.

<Situation> 
There are two planned order which basic dates are as follows:
They are same material, routing, BOM, issue quantity, float(which is 0 days), production lead time (8days)
1:Planned order A
Basic start date:9/6
Basic end date:9/9

2:Planned order B
Basic start date:9/3
Basic end date:9/6

 

When we convert them to production order, the basic dates are adjusted regarding the production lead time with backwards:
1:production order A (correct calculation)
Basic start date:8/29 (8 workdays from 9/9)
Basic end date:9/9 (Same end date as planned order)

2:Production order B (weird calculation)
Basic start date:8/27 (9 workdays from 9/6)
Basic end date:9/5 (1 day earlier than planned order)


Does anyone know why production order B have calculated 9days from the basic end dates of planned order?

we have checked following attributes;
>customized calendar, and no holidays are set during these days.
>Float are all 0 days

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Packing material issue to vendor scenario
entry.content:
Hi Team Please suggest the solution

Business wants to procure FG from the vendor and send the packing material to vendor and ask them to pack the FG in business packing material and take the FG and wanted to track the how much packing material left with vendor.

in this case FG procure cost include PO price (purchase cost + packing service cost)

Please suggest the solution.

entry.title: Over Receipt Quantity creates new line item referring to different PO receiving by RF
entry.content:
Dear SAP community,

My team and I had been experiencing a situation regarding Inbound Delivery receiving through RF with EWM transaction SCWM/RFUI for 1909 version. We have noticed that when we try to receive an Inbound Delivery through RFUI and the quantity is over receipted, the system tries to find an open Purchase Order with the same material and quantity that we are trying to receive with the ID. This is a standard behaviour according to NOTE - 3505104.

However, in our scenarios we need that the system does not apply this standard behaviour, instead to show the SAP message: "SCWM-RF_EN491 Delivery quantity exceeded". Is there any way to customize this with the standard functionalities?

entry.title: OBR1 FI reset impact on MM module on a live system
entry.content: What are the impacts of reseting the transaction data from OBR1 on other running modules. Such as MM module.

entry.title: Automatically pack multiple materials into one handling unit (Outbound Delivery)(IM)
entry.content:
Is there a way to automatically pack multiple materials (items) into one handling unit (HU) in Inventory Management (IM)? From what I understand, the Automatic Packing process in an outbound delivery (POP/POF) only allows one item per delivery to be automatically packed into one HU/packaging Material

I have two cases:

1. Different materials that should be automatically packed into one handling unit .

2. The same material, listed as multiple items, that should be packed into one HU.

entry.title: SCM - S/4 Hana Private Cloud Implementation - Course/Certificate guidance
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,
I hope you are all well. Thank you for taking the time to read my post. I am seeking your invaluable guidance.

I currently work as a System Optimization Analyst in the Supply Chain Department of the grocery retail industry, primarily working with ECC/FNR systems. Our organization is transitioning to S/4HANA Private Cloud in 2027. To support this transformation, I am looking to upskill by taking relevant courses and earning certifications.

I have started my learning journey on SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition course as a foundation and plan to pursue more specialized SCM courses afterward (Such as SAP Certified Associate - Production Planning and Manufacturing / SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP Business Network for Supply Chain) However, I am feeling uncertain about my chosen path and the learning journey towards certification.

  • The supply chain-specific course ( Production Planning and Manufacturing ) comes with a cost, whereas the learner journey for Private Cloud implementation is free with an SAP S-User ID. Is my approach correct, or am I missing something?
  • I have also begun the prerequisite courses for the certification. Are the contents provided in the learner journey sufficient for exam preparation?
  • Learning Journey on how to prepare for SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP Business Network for Supply Chain Shows only 4hr worth of content is it really sufficient for the assessment preparation.
  • Do any of these certificate act as prerequisite before pursuing specific SCM certificates. Taking into account that some few learnings are free and few have a cost associated either by paying for learning Hub or E-learning.

I'm looking for a holistic step-by-step approach. However, would appreciate focusing on key learning/certificates 1st in order to build my confidence and also display to my organisation/dept that the learning will benefit during our transformation phase.

Thanks in advance.

Bhargav Tadituri

entry.title: Work Center Hierarchy for use in CM04
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have run into an issue where I've created a work center hierarchy to be used to display the capacity inside CM04 for numerous work centers. 

I created the hierarchy in CR21. Also, I added the hierarchy configuration to the Options profile that CM04 uses (SAPB012)   

SAPB012 - Configuration

CM04 General Settings 

Once I verified the General Settings, I go to the selection screen of CM04 and run the transaction. What happens after that is CM04 disregards that I have a work center hierarchy included and displays all of the work center data for plant 0030 only. That is because the work center field in the selection screen is left blank. My thinking is that shouldn't matter and CM04 should only give an output for the work center's included in my hierarchy. Any help would be greatly appreciated, thank you!

entry.title: During GR in MIGO, S4/HANA do not replicate the Manuf Date and Expiration Date into Batch level.
entry.content:
Dear Gurus, 

Can you kinldy help me with following case?

In S4/HANA 2023 during goods receipt material in MIGO transaction users cannot see the fields related to filling the data Manufacturing Date and Expiration Date (This solution is done deliberately by changes in table OMJ5 for movement type 101 where field "Check SLED" is empty), however the data like manufacturing date and expiration date are populated on VL32N transaction level in item details, tab materials. After click goods receipt in VL32N system is not replicating data into Batch Master Record (MSC3N), the fields are empty.

Have you evere such a case? any idea how to solve it?
